title: SHAWE Kids Construction Age 3+ , Snap Cube Autism Toys, Creative and Educational Alternative to Building Blocks - Kids Safe Material! Package in Adorable Bag (100 Pieces Cubes)
features: DURABLE | Pieces easily snap together and are designed to withstand rough play. Your child can explore their wild imagination with this high quality innovative building set.
CREATIVE | With about 100 bold & brightly colored pieces to choose from, the options are endless. Build flowers, animals, cars, worlds and more by clicking pieces in place.
EDUCATIONAL | Link together pieces while improving independent play, hand eye coordination, spatial skills & dexterity. Great for sensory development, occupational therapy and autistic individuals.

SAFE | Toys are stored in adorable reusable bag for easy clean up. Unlimited Creation Cube is made from non-toxic, BPA free polyethylene, LAB TEST APPROVED! Ideal from age 3 to adult. Please supervise small children.

LEARNING WHILE PLAYING | Our toys can help stimulate children's cognitive learning skills! Play is the best teacher, so let children have fun with sorting, building, counting, creativity and arithmetic!
description: SHAWE Kids Toys, Counting Number Math Cubes Set,Creative and Early Learning to Mathlink Building Blocks Counting and Math Skills For kids who are learning to count, these cubes can assist them to count; Furthermore, children could learn adding and subtracting by snapping cubes together. Sort and Pattern by Colors Cubes come in kid-friendly, appealing colors,with different colors, these colorful cubes are terrific for grouping by color and for exploring more complex patterning activities. Different Models Bring Kids Larger World The cube set is great for building fine motor skills, hand eye coordination, develop and strengthen visual perception skills, visual motor coordination, making patterns & more! Motor toy It can cultivate children's creativity and imagination.Develop your baby's logical thinking ability,fine motor skills, also good for sensory development, occupational therapy and autistic individuals. Creative Creative assembly 3 d puzzle，Great for the brain thinking and awareness for different colors,different shapes; Exercise co-operation skills and improve teamwork ability, parents help toddlers do more complex construction sets with 2 more sets. Remarks: ✔ All building toys are sold by ChainBeThe, we are always provide safe and high quality products to our customers, Mom's Choice; ✔ All products enjoy 12-month warranty and 30-day no question refund or free replacement.
